memoryArtifacts.headline: Monumental brass of Nicholas Leveson and Denys (Bodley) Leveson in St Andrew Undershaft, London
memoryArtifacts.description:
The Antiquary vol 45 p141 (1909)
Monumental Brasses in the City of London.
    BY ANDREW OLIVER.
      II. ST. ANDREW UNDERSHAFT.
  (1) 1538.—Nycolas Leveson, wife, eight sons, ten daughters.
  Three shields, two scrolls. Mural, east wall, north aisle.
  He is dressed in a long fur cloak, open at the neck and the end thrown over the arm, showing an under-dress, and a bag or purse worn round the waist.
  The sons also wear cloaks and gowns.
  The wife and daughters are dressed in similar costumes—viz., a kennel head-dress and long flowing gown—and on the wife's figure there is a long rosary attached to a belt worn round the waist.
  From the mouth of the man proceeds a scroll, bearing “Deus miseratur mei,” and from the woman's, “et benedicat nubis.” On the left side of the slab there is a shield for Leveson, a canting coat, Gules, a fess nebule argent, between three leaves slipped or.
  Quartered with Prestwood: Argent, a chevron between three cinque-foils vert.
  On the opposite side there is a shield bearing Bodley, the family arms of the wife:
  Argent, five martlets in saltire sable, on a chief azure three ducal crowns or.
  In the centre of the slab, at the top, a shield bearing Leveson and Prestwood, impaling Bodley. The inscription is as follows:
  “Here under this tombe lyeth buryed the bodyes of Nycolas Leverson Mercer sometime sheryffe of London and Merchant of the Staple at Calys and Denys his wife which Nycolas decessyd ye XX day of August Ano dm Modcxxxix And ye said Denys ye secode day of Dceber Ao Mo vclx whous soull Jhu prdn.”
   Nycolas Leveson was buried, according to the instructions contained in his will, made the 7th day of November, 1536, in the tomb made before the upper pillar of the north side of the church, between the high altar and the altar of the norh aisle.
  His wife died on the 2nd day of December, 1560, and, in accordance with her will, was buried in the Church of St. Andrew Undershaft, in the middle aisle, and at the end of the pew which she had been accustomed to use (see Freemen of London, p. 102).
memoryArtifacts.place: London St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Middlesex, England

memoryArtifacts.headline: Denyse (Bodley) Leveson from monumental brass
memoryArtifacts.description:
Depiction of Denyse (Bodley) Leveson from monumental brass of Nicholas Leveson and Denyse in St Andrew Undershaft, London
Denys is dressed in a kennel head-dress and long flowing gown—and on her figure there is a long rosary attached to a belt worn round the waist.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionyse Bodley於1485年出生在英國戴文希德姆斯時，她的父親Thomas Bodley26歲，母親Joan Leche35歲。她於1505年與Nicholas Leveson在英國英格蘭肯特哈林結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1570年12月2日在英國艾可布萊克 諾特利享年85歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 安德魯 武安德沙阿福特 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 阿可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionyse Bodley于1485年出生在英国戴文希德姆斯时，她的父亲Thomas Bodley26岁，母亲Joan Leche35岁。她于1505年与Nicholas Leveson在英国英格兰肯特哈林结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1570年12月2日在英国艾可布萊克 諾特利享年85岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 安德魯 武安德沙阿福特 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 阿可。

nameMeanings.name: Bodley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bodley in Surrey or Bodley in Parracombe (Devon), the latter being named from the Old English personal name Boda + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionyse Bodley was born in 1485, in Sidmouth, Devon, England, her father, Thomas Bodley, was 26 and her mother, Joan Leche, was 35. She married Nicholas Leveson in 1505, in Halling, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 2 December 1570, in Black Notley, Essex, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in London St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionyse Bodley est née en 1485, à Sidmouth, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bodley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Leche, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Leveson en 1505, à Halling, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 décembre 1570, à Black Notley, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionyse Bodley 1485 in Sidmouth, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bodley 26 und ihre Mutter Joan Leche 35. Sie hat 1505 in Halling, Kent, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Leveson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Dezember 1570 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Black Notley, Essex, England und wurde in London St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionyse Bodley è nata il nel 1485 nel Sidmouth, Devon, England, sua padre, Thomas Bodley, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joan Leche, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Leveson nel 1505, nel Halling, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 2 dicembre 1570, nel Black Notley, Essex, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a London St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Middlesex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Dionyse Bodley(이)가 1485년 영국 데폰 시드모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bodley(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Leche(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 핼링에서 Nicholas Leveson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1570년 12월 2일 영국 에세스 블랙 노틀리에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 앤드루 운더샤프트 위스 스트 메리 액에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionyse Bodley nasceu em 1485, em Sidmouth, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bodley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Leche, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Leveson em 1505, em Halling, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de dezembro de 1570, em Black Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em London St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionyse Bodley родилась в 1485 г. в местности сидмоут, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bodley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Leche, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Leveson в 1505 г. в местности холлинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 2 декабря 1570 г. в местности блэкк нотли, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон ст андрю ундиршафт вит ст мэри акс, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionyse Bodley nació en 1485, en Sidmouth, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Bodley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Leche, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Nicholas Leveson en 1505, en Halling, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 2 de diciembre de 1570, en Black Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en London St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
